parameters.content:
## Pinterest – Workflow 2: Publish approved pins (daily)

Reads the **Pinterest Pins** tab, takes rows where **Approval = Approved** and **Status = Review**, resolves the **Board name -> Board ID** (from Tailwind Boards), and schedules each pin in **Tailwind** at its **Scheduled Date** (Tailwind publishes it then). Writes back Status / Pin URL / Error / Pinned Time.

**Setup:** Google Sheets + Tailwind (Bearer) credentials. Set accountId in Set Config.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ mediaUrl: $json.mediaUrl, title: $json.title, description: $json.description, url: $json.url, boardId: $json.boardId, altText: $json.altText, sendAt: $json.sendAt }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $json;
return [{ json: { 'Pin ID': p.pinId, 'Status': 'Review', 'Tailwind Post ID': '', 'Error': p.reason || 'Not ready' } }];
